meaning: n.发恶臭之人(动物或物体),臭鬼
examples: I think he's an absolute stinker to do that to her.
What a stinker that man is!
I think he means the party is a stinker.
Brand Harry S. was a stinker in its day but has gained in the collectors' market.
He gets a stinker next up, however, umpire Mallender deciding he tickled one behind.
